sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26143" key="dia/tulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διάτῠλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n26143.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">callous,</tr_> of a fistula, Megesap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:24:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.24.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
